title: Beef Stroganoff
ingredients: 1 ½ pounds top round steak, cut into 2-inch strips (can use other tender steak cut)
instructions: In a skillet, sauté mushrooms dry until brown and soft.
Stir in 2 tbsp butter and season mushrooms with salt and pepper. Set aside.
In another skillet, sauté onion in 3 tbsp butter until pale yellow.
Stir in flour and then broth to make a roux.
Add tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, basil, nutmeg, and salt and pepper to taste (be generous with pepper).
Slowly simmer the sauce for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Meanwhile, in another skillet, brown the meat strips.
Add browned meat and cooked mushrooms to the sauce.
Taste and adjust salt and pepper as needed.
Just before serving, stir in sour cream but do not allow it to boil.
notes: Can use other tender steak cuts besides top round steak
Be generous with pepper when seasoning the sauce
Sour cream must be at room temperature to prevent curdling
Do not boil the stroganoff after adding sour cream
